summary: Tested Staff/Sub-Admin Management feature. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed: Super Admin sees 13 tabs including 'Equipo', Staff sees only permitted tabs (3 in test case). Fixed bug where staff was redirected to login due to totp_enabled check.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/staff returns staff list and available_permissions (Super Admin only) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/admin/staff creates staff member with permissions - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/admin/staff rejects duplicate email - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/admin/staff rejects invalid permissions - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/admin/staff/{id} updates staff member - PASSED
Backend: Created staff appears in staff list - PASSED
Backend: Staff can login without TOTP (totp_code='000000') - PASSED
Backend: Staff login with wrong password fails - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/admin/my-permissions returns staff permissions correctly - PASSED
Backend: Super admin my-permissions returns is_super_admin=True - PASSED
Backend: Staff can access /api/admin/stats - PASSED
Backend: Staff can access /api/admin/businesses/all - PASSED
Backend: Staff CANNOT access /api/admin/staff (403 Forbidden) - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/admin/staff/{id}/reset-password returns temporary_password - PASSED
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/staff/{id} deletes staff member - PASSED
Backend: Deleted staff cannot login - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/admin/staff/permissions returns available permissions list - PASSED
Frontend: Super Admin sees 13 tabs including 'Equipo' - PASSED
Frontend: Staff sees only permitted tabs (3 tabs for overview, businesses, users) - PASSED
Frontend: 'Equipo' tab is hidden for staff users - PASSED
Frontend: Staff can access Negocios tab and view business list - PASSED
Frontend: Staff creation form has Email, Password, Name, Role, 12 permission checkboxes - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Staff CRUD endpoints correctly protected by require_super_admin dependency
Staff login works without 2FA - totp_enabled=False for staff users
my-permissions endpoint correctly returns staff permissions and is_super_admin flag
Frontend correctly filters tabs based on user permissions using hasTabPerm function
AVAILABLE_PERMISSIONS list matches frontend permission checkboxes

bug_fixed.description: Staff users were being redirected to login page due to totp_enabled check
bug_fixed.fix: Changed condition to only require totp_enabled for Super Admin (isSuperAdmin), not for staff users

staff_test_pattern.note: Staff does not require 2FA, can use dummy TOTP code

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test staff member (frontend_test_staff@bookvia.com) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff/Sub-Admin feature fully working. Super Admin (role=admin) has 13 tabs including 'Equipo' for staff management. Staff (role=staff) sees only tabs matching their permissions. Staff login uses same /api/auth/admin/login endpoint but doesn't require valid TOTP (can use '000000'). Available permissions: overview, businesses, users, reviews, categories, rankings, cities, config, support, reports, subscriptions, finance.

mocked_apis_list: Cloudinary image uploads use emergent object storage fallback

endpoints: GET /api/admin/staff - List all staff (Super Admin only)

staff_login.note: Staff can login with totp_code='000000' (no 2FA required)
